edition: Kṛṣṇadāsa Bābā 1965 edition (Vikrama Saṃvat 2022); Sanskrit text with Hindi anvaya and translation

expected_text_units.source_for_estimate: Brahma-Sūtra canonical count (4 chapters × 4 pādas × variable adhikaraṇas; standard total 555)

ground_truth_source: GRETIL Brahma-Sūtra mūla and Govinda-Bhāṣya Sanskrit transcriptions for spot-comparison; Bhanu Swami 2018 English (ISBN 978-1-980-71071-4) for sense-checking
first_page_visual_quality_notes: Heuristic (KB/page ~170): mid-range scan. Producer 'PDFArea Image to PDF Converter' suggests post-processed page images — typical OCR-friendliness moderate.
ocr_friendliness_notes: Image-PDF assembled from page scans; expect standard Devanagari OCR difficulties (saṃyukta-akṣaras, mātrā-on-mātrā). Hindi anvaya rows below the Sanskrit mūla complicate line segmentation.
ocr_notes_phase2: Will need column/region masking to separate Sanskrit mūla from Hindi anvaya.

pdfinfo.producer: PDFArea Image to PDF Converter Free (http://pdfarea.com)
